name: io.github.sshahzaiib/agy-bridge
description: Delegate heavy tasks from Claude Code to the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) with quota-aware failover.

environmentVariables.description: Path to the agy binary (defaults to `agy` on PATH)
environmentVariables.name: AGY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Override all per-tool timeouts at once, in seconds (use AGY_TIMEOUT_<TOOL> to override a single tool)
environmentVariables.name: AGY_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Truncation cap for tool output, in characters (default 50000)
environmentVariables.name: AGY_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS

environmentVariables.description: Fallback model when no chain entry is available
environmentVariables.name: AGY_DEFAULT_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to `strict` to instruct the calling agent not to absorb failed delegations (default `fallback`)
environmentVariables.name: AGY_ON_FAILURE
